title: Perform Maintenance on Organizational Systems

checks.name: System Maintenance is Performed
checks.purpose: Performance of system maintenance including scheduling, authorization, and execution is an organizational GRC documentation concern documented in maintenance policies and procedures and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: System Maintenance is Performed
checks.purpose: Performance of system maintenance is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: System Maintenance is Performed
checks.purpose: Performance of system maintenance is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: System Maintenance is Performed
checks.purpose: Performance of system maintenance is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Establish and document a system maintenance policy and schedule. Maintain records of all maintenance activities including dates, personnel, systems affected, and work performed. Ensure maintenance is authorized and tracked via a formal change management or maintenance management process.
